user_query: On fathers third day, add a superfood breakfast

fields.name: Superfood Quinoa & Berry Breakfast Bowl
fields.short_description: A nutrient-dense warm bowl featuring protein-rich quinoa, antioxidant-packed berries, and crunchy superfood seeds.
fields.meal_suggestion: Cook quinoa in almond milk with a pinch of cinnamon. Top with fresh blueberries, goji berries, a tablespoon of chia seeds, and a sprinkle of hemp hearts. Drizzle with a touch of almond butter for healthy fats.
fields.nutrition_note: Quinoa provides a complete plant-based protein profile; chia and hemp seeds offer essential Omega-3 fatty acids; berries are rich in antioxidants. This bowl is designed for sustained energy and high micronutrient density.

insertion_point.reasoning: Position -1 appends the new superfood option to the end of the existing breakfast list for Day 3. The meal is designed to meet the 'superfood' criteria by incorporating nutrient-dense ingredients like quinoa, chia, and hemp seeds.
